summary: Kang Hyunwoo, known as MELEEGOD, is convinced by his friend Youngchan to debut as a streamer, recording his gameplay in VNYAL. While hunting in the Black Forest with his powerful buff-providing companion Tangy, Hyunwoo encounters a party of Player Killers (PK players). Though the PK players invite him to join with the intent to ambush and rob him, Hyunwoo quickly realizes their plot. He decides to strategically use them to gain experience and complete his tasks before turning the tables, planning to backstab them first and use the event as content for his stream.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo is persuaded to start streaming his gameplay, with Youngchan acting as his manager.
While hunting, Hyunwoo discovers his companion, Tangy, provides surprisingly powerful combat buffs.
Hyunwoo encounters a party of PK players who invite him to join, secretly plotting to ambush and rob him.
Recognizing their malicious intentions, Hyunwoo decides to temporarily cooperate to gain experience and complete his tasks.
Hyunwoo plans to betray the PK players first, seeing it as excellent content for his new stream about "karma."
